chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI IInd Appeal No. 190 of 2019 Date Order with Signature of Judge 1.For order on office objection 2.For hearing of CMA No.5600/2019 3.For hearing of main case 21.01.2026 Mr. Ziauddin Junejo, AAG ---------- None have appeared for the appellant since 17.10.2019 when this lis was first instituted except 21.08.2020. None are present on behalf of the appellant. No intimation is received. A cautionary note has also been passed to the appellant’s counsel and appellant in person in this matter. Accordingly, this IInd Appeal is dismissed for non-prosecution. J U D G E Ashraf
